path.description: Single absolute in-container file path for this log source; globs are not supported.

required.description: Whether an unavailable source fails planning instead of degrading.

strategy.description: How Lando reifies the declared source: build-time redirect or runtime follower.

stream.description: Render and exit classification for this source's lines.

timestamps.description: Whether lines carry parseable leading timestamps so `--since` filtering can apply.
